name: config-shared-constants
description: Single home for constants shared across main.py, tui.py, manager.py, and orchestrator.py: manifest path, DEFAULT_FLOW_KIND, per-provider model defaults and their env-var names (LLM_MODEL_ENV_VAR, used by the TUI's config panel), session-store paths, reports dir, and APP_DB_CONN/APP_DOCKER_CONN fallbacks.
invariants: Real credentials (OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, MySQL password) stay .env-only and never get a default here
APP_DOCKER_CONN['host'] = 'local' is purely a display label, never passed to Docker
contracts: Modules import these constants instead of re-declaring locally
